overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night. The player character moves steadily past neon-lit food stalls and NPCs in a futuristic urban environment with heavy rain and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade in heavy rain, observing the illuminated skyline across the water

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with large illuminated digital advertisements on the facade
metal safety railing running along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
heavy rain falling throughout the scene with visible droplets in the air

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rainy waterfront promenade at night with a metal railing on the right side. The distant skyline features illuminated skyscrapers with digital billboards visible through the rain, while the wet concrete reflects the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air food stall market beginning along the waterfront

events.description: approaching the food stall area with bright neon lighting and vendor stalls becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the food stall market area, entering the zone with artificial lighting from vendor stalls

entered.detail: awning structure of a street food vendor stall with overhead cover
illuminated automated vending machine with glowing product displays
bright neon signage on distant buildings adding colorful lighting to the scene

segments.scene_description: Entering a food stall market area where the first vendor stalls appear on the right. The scene transitions from open waterfront to a semi-covered market space with neon advertisements visible in the distance and debris scattered on the wet concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense food market with multiple vendor stalls and customers

events.description: passing by NPCs gathered at food stalls, entering the denser populated market area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow market walkway, passing close to vendors and customers at illuminated food stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter preparing items
customer standing at food cart under large umbrella

entered.detail: large colorful umbrella covering a mobile food cart with glowing menu displays
metal mesh fencing partially obscuring the view of stalls behind it
transit station shelter with prominent red neon lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the dense market area with multiple food stalls illuminated by cyan and red neon lights. NPC vendors and customers are visible at the stalls, and a chain-link fence appears on the right while a red-lit transit shelter becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit shelter area with red neon lighting and pedestrian gathering

events.description: exiting the food stall market and approaching the transit shelter with prominent red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the transit shelter area, passing by groups of pedestrians standing near the building entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the building wall

entered.detail: large concrete wall of the transit station building with industrial texture
illuminated entrance to the building with overhead lighting
tall street lamp casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Approaching a transit shelter area marked by prominent red neon lighting. The food stalls are now behind as the scene opens to a paved asphalt area where groups of NPCs stand near a building entrance, with the wet ground reflecting the red and blue neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy waterfront that transitions from an open urban promenade into a dense, neon-lit market district. It begins by gliding past a metal railing beside a wet concrete walkway, where the distant skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and digital billboards is blurred by heavy rain. As the camera moves forward, the open vista shifts into a semi-covered market space, with the first vendor stalls appearing on the right amidst scattered debris. The scene then deepens into a crowded corridor of food stalls glowing with cyan and red neon lights, passing by NPC vendors and customers before a chain-link fence gives way to a red-lit transit shelter ahead. Finally, the market stalls recede as the camera opens onto a paved asphalt area, where groups of NPCs gather near a building entrance under a vivid red and blue neon glow.
